title: selaginella albidula
intro: Selaginella albidula, a species of flowering plant, is a type of resurrection fern that belongs to the genus Selaginella. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, which can aid in the treatment of infections. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, Selaginella albidula is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
